description: Using the dataset '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra.csv' which contains clinical trial data for libido across three dose groups (Placebo, Low Dose, and High Dose), perform a One-Way ANOVA with 'Libido' as the dependent variable and 'Dose' as the fixed factor. The analysis must include a simple contrast comparing the experimental groups (Low and High) against the 'Placebo' group as the reference category. Include descriptive statistics in the results and save the JASP project to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra_Contrasts.jasp'.
